channel.title: zakitpro - IT Desktop Engineering Blog
channel.description: Technical articles, PowerShell scripts, and career guides for endpoint engineers

item.title: Using AI to Validate Windows LAPS Policies in Intune Before You Get Burned
item.description: A practical desktop engineering workflow for using AI to validate Windows LAPS policy coverage, conflicts, scope gaps, and read-back results in Microsoft Intune before they turn into a security mess.

item.title: AI-Generated Microsoft Graph Queries: Automating Intune Reporting in 2026
item.description: Stop hand-crafting KQL queries for Intune reports. Learn how to use AI to generate Microsoft Graph queries that pull compliance data, device inventories, and deployment analytics in seconds—not hours.

item.title: How Desktop Engineers Can Safely Use AI for Intune Detection Rules
item.description: AI can write your Intune detection scripts in seconds, but one hallucination can brick 10,000 devices. Here's how to use it safely.

item.title: AI-Powered Intune Error Resolution: Fix Common Deployment Issues
item.description: Stop Googling obscure Intune error codes. Learn how AI helps diagnose and fix the most common Microsoft Intune deployment errors—from device enrollment failures to app installation issues—faster than ever before.

item.title: AI-Powered Microsoft Intune: Intelligent Endpoint Management in 2026
item.description: Learn how AI is transforming Microsoft Intune management. Discover AI-generated compliance policies, intelligent app deployment, automated troubleshooting, and predictive analytics for modern desktop engineering.

item.title: AI-Powered PowerShell: Automate Endpoint Management with Intelligence
item.description: Learn how to use AI to write, review, and deploy PowerShell scripts for Microsoft Intune, SCCM, and endpoint management. Boost productivity and security while maintaining production-ready code quality.

item.title: How to Use AI to Read SCCM Logs Faster: A Desktop Engineer's Triage Framework
item.description: Master the art of SCCM log triage using AI. Learn how to redact sensitive data, prompt for root cause analysis in CMTrace files, and fix deployment failures in minutes.

item.title: Best AI certifications for IT and desktop engineers (2026 edition)
item.description: A field-tested breakdown of the most valuable AI certifications for IT professionals and desktop engineers — what they cover, what they cost, and which ones actually matter for enterprise endpoint work.

item.title: AI-Assisted Microsoft Graph Reporting for Desktop Engineers
item.description: Learn how desktop engineers use Microsoft Graph and AI to build safer endpoint reports, automate checks, and reduce manual reporting time.

item.title: AI-Assisted Patch Validation for Desktop Engineers
item.description: Learn a safer Patch Tuesday workflow that combines Intune, Windows Update for Business, logs, and AI to validate changes before broad rollout.

item.title: AI-Enhanced PowerShell for Desktop Engineers
item.description: How to use AI assistants to write, review, and optimize PowerShell scripts for enterprise endpoint management.

item.title: AI runbook generation for desktop engineers
item.description: Turn resolved endpoint incidents into usable runbooks with an AI-assisted workflow that keeps approvals, technical accuracy, and support value intact.

item.title: Top 20 Essential PowerShell Gallery Scripts for Desktop Engineers in 2026
item.description: The definitive list of the top 20 most useful PowerShell scripts and modules every modern Desktop Engineer needs to have installed from the PowerShell Gallery.

item.title: AI log redaction for endpoint troubleshooting
item.description: A practical desktop engineering workflow for redacting Windows and Intune logs before AI analysis, with reusable patterns and validation checks.

item.title: AI Remediation Script Review Checklist for Desktop Engineers
item.description: A practical checklist for reviewing AI-generated remediation scripts in endpoint environments, with safety gates, testing flow, and change-control discipline.

item.title: SCCM + AI Log Triage Playbook for Desktop Engineers
item.description: A practical guide to using AI for SCCM log triage so desktop engineers can isolate client install failures faster, with safer prompts and repeatable escalation notes.

item.title: AI-Assisted Win32 App Packaging for Intune: A Desktop Engineer’s Fast, Safe Workflow
item.description: A practical workflow for packaging Win32 apps in Intune with AI-assisted scripting, strict detection logic, and safer staged rollout.

item.title: AI log triage for SCCM client install failures
item.description: A practical workflow for desktop engineers to use AI for faster SCCM client install failure triage without exposing sensitive endpoint data.

item.title: AI-Assisted SCCM Task Sequence Troubleshooting for Desktop Engineers
item.description: A practical workflow for using AI to triage SCCM task sequence failures faster while keeping enterprise troubleshooting disciplined and auditable.

item.title: Local AI Ops for IT Teams: Run Fast Automations on Employee PCs Without Losing Control
item.description: A practical desktop engineering guide to deploying local AI automations on managed endpoints with guardrails, rollback paths, and measurable support impact.
